content.speakerText: You really knocked it out of the park with the Q3 client rollout — congrats!
content.speakerTextCn: 你第三季度的客户上线做得太棒了，恭喜！

options.text: Thanks! I did it all by myself.
Thanks! I’m proud we hit the deadline ahead of schedule.
I guess the client was easy to work with.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了团队成就和提前完成目标，符合职场中谦逊且突出成果的回应方式。选项1过于自我中心，不符合团队文化；选项3过于贬低成就，显得不自信；选项4转移焦点到客户，未回应对方的表扬。

content.speakerText: What’s one thing you’re most proud of this year?
content.speakerTextCn: 今年你最自豪的一件事是什么？

options.text: I was just lucky this year.
I led the internal training program — over 50 staff got certified.
I’m proud because I didn’t get fired.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用具体数据（50多名员工认证）体现专业性和成果，符合职场表达规范。选项1和3过于消极，缺乏主动性；选项4不专业且带有负面暗示，不符合积极汇报成就的语境。

content.speakerText: How did you manage to improve customer satisfaction scores so dramatically?
content.speakerTextCn: 你是如何大幅提高客户满意度评分的？

options.text: I just worked harder than everyone else.
We redesigned the feedback system and increased response time by 40%, which boosted satisfaction by 25%.
I don’t know — it just happened.
The customers were just nicer this year.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体措施（重新设计反馈系统）和量化结果（响应时间提升40%，满意度提升25%），符合‘用数据支撑成就’的核心要求。其他选项要么归因于个人努力（不体现协作）、要么推卸责任或缺乏实质性内容，不��合专业汇报标准。
